Want to add extra boxes to your first order?
Your free tubs fill your freezer to a set capacity. Add extra boxes (1 box = 24 tubs) at £55.92 per box (£2.33 per tub) exc. VAT. Each box is 50:50 Vanilla and Chocolate.
Extra boxes 0 boxes
Tub Design
↻

How reordering works

Your first order fills the freezer completely. After that, top-up orders come in multiples of 48 tubs — just email us when your stock drops to around 20% remaining to avoid running out.
